text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly put together some<n>documents due
today, and am running<n>to deliver them, when...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A strong gust of wind blows them<n>away! My
spirits start to sink, when...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Whoopsie. These your papers?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Thanks for picking them up for m—
Yeah! Thanks for picking them up for m—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Now, what shall I do with these?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I was the one who picked them up, so<n>it's up to
me to decide what to do with<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So, what'll it be? Ask nicely, and I'll<n>give them
back to you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't shake the feeling that she's<n>teasing me
again...
choice_data_list: I'm not going to beg for them.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Haha! Nice and obedient, aren't we?<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Your phrasing needs improvement.<n>Try this:
"Give them to me and I<n>swear I'll do anything
you ask."
choice_data_list: Um, I don't know about that...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Can you really afford to be wasting<n>time here? It
says these documents<n>are due today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She isn't wrong. I barely have any<n>time until the
submission deadline.<n>Desperate times call for
desperate<n>measures...
choice_data_list:
Give them to me and I swear I'll do anything you
ask!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, there's a good trainer! I<n>knew you had
it in you!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Here you go. They're all yours.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You know, you're pretty good at<n>begging when
you put your mind to it.<n>Let's do this again, when
the fancy<n>strikes.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli leaves with my<n>documents in
hand—the documents<n>due today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can still make it in time if I hurry and<n>reprint
them. With that in mind, I head<n>back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I just manage to submit the<n>documents on time.
Just as I'm<n>breathing out a sigh of relief...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So this is your training plan...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli shows up for the<n>second time
today, still holding my<n>documents from earlier.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, your trainee<n>shows a fair
amount of promise. I<n>guess that explains your
confident<n>attitude. But still...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Shuffle!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I won't know if I never race her. Next<n>time we
see each other, let's make it<n>on the track. What
do you think, big<n>shot?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli utters what sounds an<n>awful lot
like a challenge and walks<n>away.
